column.text:
• Atlanta Braves transferred RHP Spencer Strider to the 60-day injured list with right elbow inflammation, extending his absence significantly.
• Kansas City Royals placed LHP Cole Ragans on the 60-day injured list with a left elbow impingement.
• Cleveland Guardians placed RF Chase DeLauter on the 10-day injured list with a right side rib fracture.
• The Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to June 14, due to back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• The Detroit Tigers activated right-hander Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
• Athletics activated starting pitcher Aaron Civale from the 15-day injured list.
• San Francisco Giants sent LF Heliot Ramos on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Sacramento.
• Seattle Mariners recalled outfielder Connor Joe from Triple-A Tacoma.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
